title: Figma learning lab: design to development workflows
key_points: Offers a beginner-friendly walkthrough of moving from design to code using Figma's MCP server.
Covers best practices for bringing code context into Figma, specifically through variable prefixes and Code Connect.
Explains how to get stronger results from your design system in design-to-development workflows.
Includes a follow-on session in the Learning Lab Lounge for informal time with the Figma team.
